title: Fix preset discovery and image-directory default truth
summary: 0.6.20 keeps the 0.6.19 preset and playlist hardening, but fixes raw preset discovery, shortens the hosted-player asset names shown in VaM, defaults all-image loads back to paused even when the source is a directory, and makes focus-loss resume less likely to restart from zero.
changes: Rename raw dev_deploy hosted-player presets to use an uppercase Preset_ prefix so VaM preset discovery sees them reliably.
Shorten the internal 2018 hosted-player and base-player prefab paths so the CUA asset dropdown is readable again.
Treat all-image selections, including directories that resolve entirely to images, as paused-by-default unless an explicit play flag is provided.
Use the same paused-by-default rule when saving presets so image-directory presets stop capturing stale play intent.
Preserve the best available playback-time snapshot on app focus loss instead of falling back to zero more easily.
reasoning: The current operator witness points at two separate truths: raw preset discovery is sensitive to uppercase Preset naming, and the old internal asset names are too long to inspect confidently in VaM.
Image-directory behavior should follow the same pause-by-default rule as single images instead of inheriting leftover video play intent.
App-switch recovery is safer when it reuses the best known playback time instead of only trusting one timeline read during the focus-loss frame.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: The new raw modern_tv preset should show up in VaM under its explicit 0.6.20 alpha name.
The CUA asset dropdown should show much shorter internal prefab names for the hosted and baseline player assets.
Loading an image directory should stop immediately autoplaying just because a previous video or preset wanted play.
Movie app switches should be less likely to jump back to the beginning when focus changes.
knownIssues: If image next or previous still behaves inconsistently after 0.6.20, the remaining seam is probably playlist state reuse rather than asset selection.
The current branch name still reflects the older 0.6.14 stability train and should be corrected once this train is merged forward cleanly.
